generic_rules: Repairs should focus on fixing AGREE syntax errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize resolving identifier references and type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Assignments (`assign`) are valid only in implementation scopes and target existing outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new AADL elements as a direct response to AGREE validation errors.
Avoid placing guarantee statements within implementation annexes.
Do not attempt to repair syntax errors by modifying the AADL model.
